privileged_info_summary: I have audited the calligra_words_env meteorological_assessment_formatting task. The task generates a synthetic ODT document via a python script in setup_task.sh which incorporates real-world facts from the May 20, 2013 Moore Tornado (e.g. EF5 damage at Briarwood and Plaza Towers elementary schools). All metadata claims regarding the expected document formatting constraints (H1 sections, H2 subsections, table columns, body alignment samples, and title) perfectly match the instructions and content generated by setup_task.sh. However, I discovered a critical bug: the file `verifier.py` referenced in `task.json` is completely missing from the task environment, rendering the task unscorable.
